frontmatter.title: LLDP Field Notes
frontmatter.description: A pragmatic, systems-level reference to LLDP: how it works, how to read it, and how to troubleshoot it in real networks.

frontmatter.title: Cisco IOS Field Notes: OSPFv2
frontmatter.description: A systems-level, practical reference for single-area OSPFv2 design, adjacency state mechanics, cost modeling, packet exchange, and field troubleshooting on Cisco IOS.

frontmatter.title: OpenSSL Demystified
frontmatter.description: A practical, systems-level deep dive into OpenSSL, X.509 certificates, TLS handshakes, PKI files, and trust chains — with real commands and mental models.

frontmatter.title: From ASCII to Unicode
frontmatter.description: Dive deep into the layers of Unicode, the universal text encoding standard — from its origins in ASCII to scripts, code points, normalization, and security implications.
